untranslatable_reason: Diamond Top pattern requires visual shape recognition (four pivot points forming diamond geometry) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators. translation_notes: Signal describes a visual candlestick pattern (Diamond Top reversal) that requires identifying four specific pivot points forming a diamond shape. This geometric pattern recognition is not translatable into discrete indicator-based conditions. The 69% success rate in bear markets and 17% average decline suggest a downside breakout bias, but without specific entry trigger rules or exit target methodology (author notes the 50% success of adding/subtracting from breakout price), a reliable rule cannot be constructed. Recommend: (1) Define diamond formation using specific pivot point logic, (2) Clarify exit target methodology, or (3) Use alternative indicators like ADX or ATR for trend confirmation.
